MASTER CALENDAR JURY

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-15-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for prove-up hearing from Presiding Judge's Dept. on an Unlawful Detainer.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Susan Lee

Appearance:
Counsel: Arnold Evje., Esq. for Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Melissa Bray, Witness for Plaintiff

Plaintiff's exhibit 1- 3 Day Notice was admitted into evidence.
After evidence and testimony was heard, the court grants judgment for Plaintiff for Restitution and Possesssion of the premises located at : 440 Eddy St. #306, S.F., CA.
Forfeiture of Rental Agreement.
Back rent of $1,241.00
Unlawful Detainer Damages of: $678.92
Costs: $148.30
Plaintiff's counsel stipulated to the return of Exhibit 1
Judgment signed in open court. See scanned document
